steps.title: Identify the shared feature from the notes
steps.content: The brown violetear has a “short, black, straight bill” and the little hermit has a “long, black, curved bill” — both have black bills, making this their most concrete shared trait.

steps.title: Match this to the choice that emphasizes similarity
steps.content: Choice A directly states that both birds have black bills, framing this as their similarity while acknowledging each has “unique traits of its own.” The other three choices either describe only one bird, emphasize a difference rather than similarity, or ignore the birds entirely. That matches choice A — A is correct.
